backend.changelog: Every SolidWorks open path now enforces the same tenant precondition: when SolidWorks is on a different 3DEXPERIENCE tenant than the BOM, the app closes and relaunches it on the correct tenant automatically - including when the only unsaved changes are SolidWorks' own auto-resolved references (a one-click confirmation guards any real unsaved work; nothing is ever saved to the platform). Verification failures now block with a clear message instead of silently proceeding.

cadBridge.changelog: Opening a file from the gateway now refuses cleanly when SolidWorks (Connected mode) is logged into a different tenant than requested, instead of popping the 'content was not found on the platform you are logged into' dialog. Mirrors the existing Connector-mode guard.
